title: Corvallis, OR
html:
Corvallis, OR

Corvallis is the four-year container — Yahir's college base from roughly 2021 through 2025, the place between Grants Pass adolescence and the china / Austin adult chapters. Geographically a small Willamette-Valley college town, but in the corpus it functions as a crucible: the city where the founder voice hardens, where loneliness gets named, and where the Ahmad-Jamal-stream-era thesis on AI is first written down.

The granularity at which Yahir mapped Corvallis is itself revealing. 2021 10 25 places for a date is a hyper-specific date-spot vault — picnic table by Cordley West Dock, the secret trail spot off SW 30th Street, Crowbar rooftop, Corazon, TreeBeerds, Majestic theatre, the parking lots and tunnels around Linus Pauling and Sackett Hall. These are real fieldnotes from someone scouting his own town in person, not a Yelp scrape. They show up next to "Tunnel of Love, Klevan Ukraine" — Corvallis as the everyday and the bucket list living in the same document.

The town is also the venue for several formative Yahir-modes. The corvallis crypto club meetups and the December 2021 "Hey Cameron, this is YG" note (2021 12 05 hey cameron yg thesis on drugs) anchor the late-2021 crypto-curious chapter that produced the Mario-Kart-banana drugs thesis. OSIG (Oregon State Investment Group) appears in fall 2022 (2022 09 13 drive thru weed) as a value investing club period. The "Failure is terrifying. It means not fitting in" meditation (2022 01 07 failure is terrifying) — with its haunting "like a massive bass behind you thumping" image — is written here in sophomore winter, the cleanest early entry in founder loneliness 2022 2026. The "CEOs of the future will be at a disadvantage if they are not engineers" question (2021 11 05 ceos of the future) is also Corvallis-era — Yahir would later answer that question by becoming the engineer himself with anthropic claude and windsurf ide.

Corvallis is also home to the longest running todo log in the corpus: 2025 05 30 todos, spanning May 2025 through April 2026, captures the Corvallis-to-Austin bridge — apartment hunts, "figure out how to get remaining things from Corvallis", Brotein launch, ISSA CPT certification, Supabase uploads, and the recurring "call dad / call maya / call david". The recurring habits-inventory note (2022 06 04 one time things habits) — with its "Owen for gym / Yermy for plans" dependency confessions — is also Corvallis. Roommate cuva lives here. By mid-September 2025 he physically leaves (2025 09 23 how im scraping by), but the operational center of gravity overlaps with Austin for months.

Source summaries

  • 2019 08 11 voice memo 2017 — YBW leadership talk recorded in Corvallis (Oregon Entrepreneurs camp)
  • 2021 10 12 voice memo 1000 — sophomore-window family-conflict reflection
  • 2021 10 25 places for a date
  • 2021 11 05 ceos of the future
  • 2021 12 05 hey cameron yg thesis on drugs
  • 2022 01 07 failure is terrifying
  • 2022 06 04 one time things habits
  • 2022 09 13 drive thru weed
  • 2025 05 30 todos
  • first batch 2026 04 26
